task: Show me historical data for EUR/USD.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to Yahoo Finance's EUR/USD historical data page at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/EURUSD=X/history/. The final snapshots clearly show the page title 'EUR/USD (EURUSD=X) Stock Historical Prices & Data - Yahoo Finance' and visible historical data table content with date range controls and rows of daily prices. The assistant's final response accurately states that the historical data page is open and summarizes the visible date range and columns.
final_result_response:
Done. I opened Yahoo Finance directly to the EUR/USD historical data page:

https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/EURUSD=X/history/

It’s showing daily historical prices for May 13, 2025 to May 13, 2026, with columns for Date, Open, High, Low, Close, Adj Close, and Volume. Current quote shown: 1.1721 USD.
action_history: Opening Yahoo Finance: const p1 = await openTab('https://finance.yahoo.com/');
Opening historical data tab: await page.locator('e287').click();
Opening direct historical data page: await openTab('https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/EURUSD=X/history/');

screenshots.title: Waiting for EUR/USD quote to load
